$comment: Projects 模块的人工覆盖（站长可编辑）：featured 置顶清单、hide 隐藏清单、descriptions 双语简介覆盖（键为仓库名）。

Earnings-Call-Sentiment-Analyser.en: Decompose earnings calls into management framing vs. analyst pushback — LLM-extracted sentiment with residual-return correlation.
Earnings-Call-Sentiment-Analyser.zh: 把财报电话会拆解为管理层叙事与分析师质询——LLM 情绪提取与残差收益相关性分析。

Ghost-Job-Detection-And-Trading-Signal.en: Ghost-job intensity as a trading signal — XGBoost, SHAP, GMM, walk-forward backtest.
Ghost-Job-Detection-And-Trading-Signal.zh: 幽灵职位强度交易信号——XGBoost、SHAP、GMM 与 walk-forward 回测。
